each group that received treatment. The layers of defense are as follows:
normal control > AT-CU > high dose > AT-CU low dose > AT > CU >
HFD (Fig. 12). The elevated oxidative stress in the HFD group may be the
reason for the decreased level of enzymatic defense. Although the high
dose of AT-CU nanoparticle demonstrated the greatest level of protec-
tion, low dose and high dose AT-CU exhibited no noticeable difference.
So, the investigation on the low dose of AT-CU continued.
